usage: definePartition [-help] [-coreSpacing {left right top bottom}] [-minPitchBottom <integer>] [-minPitchLeft <integer>] [-minPitchRight <integer>] [-minPitchTop <integer>] [-pinLayerBottom {list_of_layers}] [-pinLayerLeft {list_of_layers}] [-pinLayerRight {list_of_layers}] [-pinLayerTop {list_of_layers}] [-placementHalo {left  right top bottom }] [-railwidth <float>] [-reservedLayer {list_of_layers}] [-routingHalo <float>] [-routingHaloBottomLayer <integer>] [-routingHaloTopLayer <integer>] [-stdCellHeight <float>] {-hinst <string> | -proto {master_hinst_name_list} | -cell <cellNname>} [-checkCloneAlignment ] [-hinst <string> [-copyFrom <refPtnName>]] [-cell <cellNname> [-copyFrom <refPtnName>]]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies name of the cell to define partition on one of its R0 instantiation. For black-boxes non-R0 is chosen if R0 orient is not found

options.name: -checkCloneAlignment
options.description: Specifies to only check alignment of clone with master partition.

options.name: -copyFrom
options.description: Specifies name of the reference partition from which to copy fence and its properties

options.name: -coreSpacing
options.description: Specifies the space between the module boundary and core design area of partition module on left, right, top,and bottom sides

options.name: -hinst
options.description: Specifies the name of the hierarchical instance.

options.name: -minPitchBottom
options.description: Specifies the pin pitch dimension for the Bottom partition sides.

options.name: -minPitchLeft
options.description: Specifies the pin pitch dimension for the Left partition sides.

options.name: -minPitchRight
options.description: Specifies the pin pitch dimension for the Right partition sides.

options.name: -minPitchTop
options.description: Specifies the pin pitch dimension for the Top partition sides.

options.name: -pinLayerBottom
options.description: Specifies the metal layers to use for the partition.

options.name: -pinLayerLeft
options.description: Specifies the metal layers to use for the partition.

options.name: -pinLayerRight
options.description: Specifies the metal layers to use for the partition.

options.name: -pinLayerTop
options.description: Specifies the metal layers to use for the partition.

options.name: -placementHalo
options.description: {left right top bottom } Specifies extra spacing, in micrometers of the partition that should not be used for placement.

options.name: -proto
options.description: Specifies master_hinst_name_list for prototyping flow.

options.name: -railwidth
options.description: Specifies the standard cell power rail width, in micrometers.

options.name: -reservedLayer
options.description: Specifies the metal layers that are used for routing in the partition and generating partition pins.

options.name: -routingHalo
options.description: Specifies routing spacing, in micrometers, around the sides of the partition.

options.name: -routingHaloBottomLayer
options.description: Specifies the bottom partition layer for which routing halo will be created.

options.name: -routingHaloTopLayer
options.description: Specifies the top partition layer for which routing halo will be created .

options.name: -stdCellHeight
options.description: Specifies the standard cell height for the partition.
